pr.title: Record: Sliding Window Eval, 2048 Vocab Size, fp16 embeddings, SWA, NorMuon, FA3; mean_val_bpb:1.160

output.summary: Combines a 2048-BPE tokenizer with fp16 embeddings, NorMuon blocks, int6 weights via FA3-aware fake quantization, SWA, and sliding-window eval.
techniques: 2048 BPE tokenizer + fp16 embeddings to balance vocab/resolution
NorMuon blocks with FA3-backed int6 fake-quant training
SWA checkpoint averaging plus sliding-window eval (seqlen1024 stride64)
